§6Pure Crystals§f:
The §6Pure Crystals §fare §erefined §f§6Certus Quartz §f and §6Nether Quartz §f variants. They are §6required §f for advanced AE2 components like §6Formation Cores §f and §6Crafting Units§f.

§6Pure Crystal Family§f:
- §bPure Certus Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:10) — required for §6Formation Core §f and §6P2P Tunnel §f
- §bPure Nether Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:11) — required for §6Engineering Processor §f variants

§6Production Path (No direct crafting recipe)§f:
- §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f is produced by §bgrowing §f a §6Certus Quartz Bud §f in a §6Crystal Growth Accelerator §f (see §6Crystal Growth Accelerator §f quest)
- The Inscriber can also produce §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f from a §6Certus Quartz Crystal §f in a §6Inscriber §f with the appropriate press
- §6Pure Nether Quartz Crystal §f is produced by §bgrinding §f a §6Nether Quartz Crystal §f in a §6Macerator §f then §6charging §f it in a §6Charger §f

§6Function§f:
- §bFormation Core §f: requires §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f + §6Certus Quartz Crystal §f
- §bP2P Tunnel §f: requires §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f as a §6fluix crystal §f alternative
- §bEngineering Processor §f: requires §6Pure Nether Quartz Crystal §f as one of the §6quartz variants §f

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Pure Certus Quartz Crystal is a component of (recipe_count=0 in jei-graph), but it is referenced in 6 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bFormation Core §f crafting
- §bP2P Tunnel §f crafting
- §bSpatial IO §f recipes
- §bAE2 Decorations §f (e.g., §6Quartz Glass §f, §6Fluix Block §f)

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: a §6Crystal Growth Accelerator §f is the §6most efficient §f way to produce §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f in bulk
- §eTip§f: pair the §6Crystal Growth Accelerator §f with an §6Import Bus §f (feeding §6Certus Quartz Buds §f) and an §6Export Bus §f (extracting grown Pure Crystals) for §6full automation §f
- §cWarning§f: §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f cannot be §6crafted §f directly from §bregular §fCertus Quartz Crystal — it must be §bgrown §f
- §cWarning§f: §6Pure Nether Quartz Crystal §f requires a §6Macerator §f, a §6Charger §f, and §bNether Quartz §f — make sure the §bmacerator §f is §6loaded §f
